package.name: ros2bag_replay
package.description:
ROS 2 package for replaying camera bag data for early-stage development and testing of ROS 2 systems without physical sensors.
Provides a camera_info_fixer_node that corrects header timestamps and frame_ids in CameraInfo messages recorded in bags where these fields were empty or zero — a common issue with RealSense bags. A launch file with an optional RViz2 visualisation is included.
